history.text: The Kingdom of Lan Xang emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Kingdoms of Luang Prabang, Vientiane and Champasak ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Vassals of Siam appears in Laos' historical record.
French protectorate placed the territory under outside administration.
Unified kingdom ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Laos became independent from France, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Communist state was established, giving Laos a new political framework.

worthSeeing.title: Luang Prabang:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO-listed city of golden temples, saffron-robed monks, and misty Mekong mornings.

worthSeeing.title: Plain of Jars:
worthSeeing.text: Mysterious prehistoric landscape strewn with thousands of ancient stone jars.

worthSeeing.title: Vang Vieng:
worthSeeing.text: Dramatic karst limestone scenery with caves, rivers, and adventure sports.

planningQuestions.a: Luang Prabang, Plain of Jars, Vang Vieng.
